response: Hey everyone, I'm Harper. I like to stay level-headed in group situations and really value cooperation, so I tend to listen carefully and look for patterns before jumping to conclusions. Looking forward to working with all of you to figure this out.

Hey everyone, I'm Dana. I tend to be pretty quiet and observant in groups—I get anxious about making the wrong call, so I usually take my time before speaking up. I'll be listening carefully to what everyone says before I make any decisions.

Hey everyone, I'm Finley. I like to take a measured approach—I'll listen to what everyone has to say and weigh the evidence carefully before making a move. I think staying methodical helps avoid costly mistakes in situations like this.

ACTION: Kill Harper
